metadata.description: Hoopit agent skills, grouped for the `skills` CLI and Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hoopit-onboarding
plugins.description: Take a fresh machine to a working Hoopit checkout (api / flutter-app) and install the supporting CLIs.

plugins.name: hoopit-dev
plugins.description: Day-to-day dev workflows and CLIs: Jira/Sentry issues, PR review, Atlassian + CircleCI from the terminal.

plugins.name: hoopit-misc
plugins.description: Odds and ends: status line, idea stress-testing.
